name: Enneacraft Reset
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>糾罪巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エニアクラフト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>再巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リセット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Place 1 "Enneapolis" from your Deck or GY face-up in your Field Zone, or if you control "Enneapolis", you can negate the effects of face-up cards your opponent controls up to the number of cards in your Pendulum Zones instead. If your opponent activates a card or effect while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; change "Enneacraft" monsters you control to face-down Defense Position up to the number of cards in your Pendulum Zones. You can only activate 1 "Enneacraft Reset" per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Enneapolis" from your Deck or GY face-up in your Field Zone, or if you control "Enneapolis", you can negate the effects of face-up cards your opponent controls up to the number of cards in your Pendulum Zones instead. If your opponent activates a card or effect while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; change "Enneacraft" monsters you control to face-down Defense Position up to the number of cards in your Pendulum Zones. You can only activate 1 "Enneacraft Reset" per turn.

action: Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Graveyard in your Field Zone
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
